resources.string: A sample Mokera field guide. Opening a screen or tapping \"Like\" emits an Analytics event.
To see these overlaid on the HUD at the top of the screen, swap :demo:core:analytics:prod for :demo:core:analytics:debug in demo/app/build.gradle.kts and rebuild.
Born from the green tea in a teacup. Calm and quiet, it shows up when you need a moment to breathe.
Born from a freshly brewed cup of coffee. Your late-night work buddy — always sleepy-looking, yet somehow full of energy.
Born from a glass of milk. Pure white and fluffy, friendly enough to warm up to anyone right away.
Born from a glass of orange juice. Bursting with energy, it is usually the first to show up in the morning.
Born from a melon soda. Fizzy and forever bouncing; a moody one whose mood bubbles right to the surface.
